title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
